sentences.arabic: فَازَ فَرِيقُ الْمَدْرَسَةِ بِمُبَارَاةِ كُرَةِ الْقَدَمِ أَمَسِ.
sentences.translation: Školski tim je pobijedio na fudbalskoj utakmici jučer.
sentences.translationEn: The school team won the football match yesterday.

sentences.arabic: سَجَّلَ الْفَرِيقُ ثَلَاثَةَ أَهْدَافٍ فِي الْمُبَارَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Tim je postigao tri gola na utakmici.
sentences.translationEn: The team scored three goals in the match.

sentences.translation: Učenici su se jako obradovali ovoj pobjedi.
sentences.translationEn: The students were very happy about this victory.

sentences.translation: Direktor je zahvalio igračima na njihovom trudu.
sentences.translationEn: The principal thanked the players for their efforts.
